Services Case Studies About Contact

Services That Pay for Themselves

Decision-grade data, 24–48 hour turnaround, Procore-compatible deliverables.

📅

Bi-Weekly Progress Flights

We establish a baseline before anyone steps on site. Then we return every two weeks with decision-grade orthomosaics, 3D models, and timeline comparisons.

  • ✓ Orthorectified maps (2D and 3D)
  • ✓ Timeline comparisons showing week-over-week progress
  • ✓ Automated change detection between flights
  • ✓ 24–48 hour delivery
  • ✓ Scale back to monthly after dry-in
📸

Pre-Construction Documentation

Before the first shovel hits dirt, we document existing conditions. Road damage, interior fixtures, site conditions — all timestamped and georeferenced.

Real Result: $40,000 saved at Severance Library

Our pre-construction baseline proved existing road damage before construction began. The city claimed $80K in damage; we split it to $40K. "I was the hero because I saved a big chunk of money."

  • ✓ Exterior site documentation (roads, curbs, landscaping)
  • ✓ Interior condition documentation
  • ✓ All data georeferenced and timestamped
  • ✓ Metadata that holds up in disputes
🏢

Interior Documentation

84,000 square feet. 20 hours on site. Every fixture, every radiator, every piece of copper — mapped and documented before construction crews arrive.

Real Result: $400,000 change order avoided at Clear Creek Schools

When thieves stole copper before construction started, the GC tried to pin a $400K change order on FP. Our interior documentation proved the building was empty when we arrived. The GC ate the cost.

  • ✓ Complete interior mapping with RTK accuracy
  • ✓ Every fixture, pipe, and component documented
  • ✓ Photo-verified point clouds
  • ✓ Proof that stands up in arbitration
📊

Volumetric Surveys & 3D Modeling

Cut/fill calculations, stockpile measurements, BIM-ready point clouds. Compatible with Procore, Autodesk, and your VDC workflow.

  • ✓ Cut/fill volume calculations
  • ✓ Stockpile measurements and tracking
  • ✓ BIM-ready point clouds (.las, .e57, .rcp)
  • ✓ Procore and Autodesk integration
  • ✓ Orthophotos with survey-grade accuracy

What You Get

📁 Data Files

  • • Orthomosaics (GeoTIFF)
  • • Point clouds (.las, .e57)
  • • 3D mesh models (.obj, .fbx)
  • • DEM / DTM rasters

🎥 Video Deliverables

  • • Progress time-lapses
  • • 3D flythroughs
  • • Marketing footage
  • • Custom angles on request

📊 Reports

  • • Progress comparison reports
  • • Volume calculations
  • • Change detection analysis
  • • Executive summaries

🔌 Integrations

  • • Procore
  • • Autodesk (BIM 360, Revit)
  • • Bluebeam
  • • Custom API available

Construction drone services in Colorado. Part 107 certified. Decision-grade data in 24–48 hours.
